name: Shadow Crime Lab
description: Move an analytic lamp through separated probe zones and physically tag the one shadow whose causal response violates the scene geometry.
natural_language: Move the light through every probe zone. Then drag the red evidence tag onto the shadow that cannot be physically true.

metadata.notes: Five-object analytic projection lab with challenge-derived forged response, four-zone causal probing, raw pointer transcripts, independent shadow geometry replay, and physical polygon tagging.
